---
pagetitle: "Seminars 2026"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Seminar Series 2026]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# AIEPS Seminars 2026

[AI in Earth and Planetary Sciences · Online/Hybrid Talks]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[As announced]{} [Online/Hybrid]{} [Teams/Zoom links shared with registrants]{}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body}

## Programme {#programme}

::: {.schedule-table}

| Date | Talk | Speaker | Format |
|------|------|---------|--------|
| 11 May 2026 | [Uncertainty Quantification Using Hamiltonian Monte Carlo for Structural Geological Modelling with Implicit Neural Representations](2026/uncertainty-hmc-implicit-neural-representations.qmd) | [Kaifeng Gao](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaifeng-g-0a347b23a/) | Online |
| 10 Mar 2026 | [Synthetic Geology: Encoding Geological Knowledge into Generative AI Models for Probabilistic 3D Reconstruction](2026/synthetic-geology-generative-ai.qmd) | [Simon Ghyselincks](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonghyselincks/) | Online |
| 19 Feb 2026 | [Neural Earthquake Forecasting with Minimal Information: Limits, Interpretability, and the Role of Markov Structure](2026/neural-earthquake-forecasting-markov-structure.qmd) | [Jonas Köhler](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonas-k%C3%B6hler-5664693a6/) | Online |

:::

## Archive {#archive}

See [2025 seminars](2025.qmd) for previous-year seminar information.

:::
